sentences.target: Das hat für mich große Bedeutung.

translations.de: Das hat für mich große Bedeutung.
translations.en: That means a lot to me.
translations.tr: Bu benim için çok şey ifade ediyor.
translations.vi: Điều đó có ý nghĩa rất lớn đối với tôi.
translations.hi: यह मेरे लिए बहुत मायने रखता है.
translations.ro: Asta înseamnă foarte mult pentru mine.
translations.ja: 私にとってとても大切です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun in nominative singular (subject); refers to some previously mentioned or contextual entity.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes an accusative object ('Bedeutung').
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a prepositional object expressing beneficiary/experiencer.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Bedeutung'; strong inflection (-e) with a feminine singular accusative noun lacking an article.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne die Bedeutung dieses Zeichens nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː bəˈdɔɪ̯tʊŋ ˈdiːzəs ˈtsaɪ̯çəns nɪçt/

translations.de: Ich kenne die Bedeutung dieses Zeichens nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː bəˈdɔɪ̯tʊŋ ˈdiːzəs ˈtsaɪ̯çəns nɪçt/
translations.en: I don't know the meaning of this symbol.
translations.es: No conozco el significado de este símbolo.
translations.fr: Je ne connais pas la signification de ce symbole.
translations.it: Non conosco il significato di questo simbolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不知道这个符号的意思。
translations.yue: 我唔知呢個符號嘅意思。
translations.ru: Я не знаю, что означает этот символ.
translations.pt: Eu não sei o significado deste símbolo.
translations.he: אני לא יודע מה המשמעות של הסמל הזה.
translations.tr: Bu sembolün ne anlama geldiğini bilmiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi không biết ý nghĩa của ký hiệu này.
translations.nl: Ik weet niet wat dit symbool betekent.
translations.uk: Я не знаю значення цього символу.
translations.hu: Nem tudom, mit jelent ez a szimbólum.
translations.hi: मुझे इस निशान का मतलब नहीं पता.
translations.pl: Nie wiem, co oznacza ten symbol.
translations.el: Δεν ξέρω τι σημαίνει αυτό το σύμβολο.
translations.nb: Jeg vet ikke hva dette symbolet betyr.
translations.id: Saya tidak tahu arti simbol ini.
translations.sv: Jag vet inte vad den här symbolen betyder.
translations.ro: Nu știu ce înseamnă acest simbol.
translations.da: Jeg ved ikke, hvad dette symbol betyder.
translations.fi: En tiedä, mitä tämä symboli tarkoittaa.
translations.ja: このマークの意味がわかりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'kenne'.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Bedeutung' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; head of the object NP.
Demonstrative determiner, genitive singular (neuter here); modifies 'Zeichens' meaning 'of this'.
Common noun, neuter singular genitive; genitive attribute/complement to 'Bedeutung'.
Negative particle; sentential negation of the predicate ('kenne ... nicht').

sentences.target: Die Bedeutung vom Wort ist unklar.

translations.de: Die Bedeutung vom Wort ist unklar.
translations.en: The meaning of the word is unclear.
translations.es: El significado de la palabra no está claro.
translations.fr: Le sens du mot n'est pas clair.
translations.it: Il significato della parola non è chiaro.
translations.pt: O significado da palavra não está claro.
translations.vi: Ý nghĩa của từ này không rõ ràng.
translations.nl: De betekenis van het woord is onduidelijk.
translations.hi: उस शब्द का अर्थ स्पष्ट नहीं है.
translations.el: Η σημασία της λέξης δεν είναι ξεκάθαρη.
translations.ja: その単語の意味ははっきりしません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject 'Bedeutung'.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; grammatical subject.
Preposition (contraction of 'von dem') governing the dative; introduces a noun phrase expressing 'of/from'.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'vom'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement with 'ist'.

sentences.target: Für sie hat das keine Bedeutung.

translations.de: Für sie hat das keine Bedeutung.
translations.en: It doesn't mean anything to her.
translations.es: Eso no significa nada para ella.
translations.fr: Pour elle, ça ne veut rien dire.
translations.it: Per lei non vuol dire nulla.
translations.zh-Hans: 对她来说这没什么意义。
translations.ru: Для неё это ничего не значит.
translations.pt: Isso não significa nada para ela.
translations.tr: Bu onun için hiçbir şey ifade etmiyor.
translations.vi: Điều đó không có ý nghĩa gì với cô ấy.
translations.uk: Для неї це нічого не означає.
translations.hi: उसके लिए इसका कोई मतलब नहीं है.
translations.pl: Dla niej to nic nie znaczy.
translations.el: Για εκείνη αυτό δεν σημαίνει τίποτα.
translations.da: Det betyder ikke noget for hende.
translations.ja: 彼女にとっては何の意味もありません。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the accusative; forms a fronted prepositional phrase indicating the affected party.
Personal pronoun in accusative; object of 'für' (gender/number ambiguous in surface form).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes an accusative object.
Demonstrative pronoun, nominative singular neuter; grammatical subject.
Negative determiner functioning like an article; feminine singular accusative agreeing with 'Bedeutung'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'hat', negated by 'keine'.
